prompt:
Using REFERENCE_0 as the product and lifestyle-photo base, transform the casual shoe photo into a polished Nike-style product advertising campaign for Nike Mind 001. Keep the same white slip-on recovery shoe concept, the orange massage nodes in the footbed, and include the original deck photo as one collage element, but redesign everything as a clean editorial brand layout.

Create exactly 3 stacked horizontal poster panels on one vertical canvas, separated by thin borders:

Panel 1: Hero launch ad. Show a large floating cutout render of one shoe angled upward, with a beige desert/rock landscape strip on the right and minimal paper-texture collage pieces. Add a large bold headline reading “Nike” and “mind 001”. Add the subheadline Recovery for Body. Calm for Mind.. Include small product-system text in the upper left, a small handwritten oval note reading “mental reset.”, three simple circular feature icons labeled “LIGHTWEIGHT COMFORT”, “MASSAGE FOOTBED”, and “EASY SLIP-ON”, plus a small product label card and the footer phrase “MOVE LESS. FEEL MORE.”

Panel 2: Lifestyle collage ad. Use the reference photo as the main rectangular photo in the upper center/right, preserving the feet-on-deck viewpoint. Surround it with cutout product detail photos: one close-up of the perforated upper, one angled view of the orange massage footbed, and one close-up of the wavy cushioned sole. Add a bold headline on the left reading Made to Feel Better.. Add a small handwritten note at the top left reading “Every step, a soft reset.”, a paper note at the top right reading “Take it easy. You’re doing great.”, a small tab reading “DETAILS 001”, and handwritten annotation arrows for “Breathable upper Soft support. All day calm.” and “Cushioning that moves with you.”

Panel 3: Multi-angle product poster. Show exactly 3 floating cutout views of the shoe on a white/off-white background: one angled top view near the top center, one side/top view near the lower left revealing the orange footbed, and one sole/side view on the right. Add large stacked typography on the left reading “Mind Set. Go Light.” with “Light.” in orange. Include small Nike Mind Series text, a circular handwritten note reading Simple. Soft. Essential., a vertical barcode label on the right reading “MIND 001” and “YOUR DAILY RESET.”, and an orange call-to-action button reading SHOP NIKE MIND 001 →.

Style: premium minimalist sneaker campaign, off-white paper background, soft shadows, cutout collage aesthetic, black/gray typography with orange accent highlights, subtle taped-paper textures, handwritten red/orange pencil annotations, clean modern sans-serif type. Make the shoes look like high-end studio product renders while still clearly derived from the reference shoe. Avoid adding extra panels, extra shoes beyond the specified product views, watermarks, or unrelated branding beyond Nike-style marks and text.
